name: Johnny Marvin
abstract: John Senator Marvin (July 11, 1897 – December 10, 1944) was an early American recording artist and musician, starting in 1924 and covering a twenty-year period for many record labels.

about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Do you remember playing for him? [INTERVIEWEE] Well he would play what he would play.
